summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Sapphire Alpha Capital coming-soon site. 8/8 pytest backend tests pass (waitlist create/duplicate/invalid/count, contact valid/invalid-email/missing-fields, root). Frontend E2E via Playwright verified hero copy, all navbar smooth-scroll links, Get Notified scroll, waitlist happy path (button switches to 'Joined'), waitlist duplicate toast ('This email is already on the waitlist.'), contact valid submission (success toast + form cleared), legal routes /privacy /terms /disclaimer render with correct data-testids, Back-to-home link returns to /, mobile nav toggle opens mobile menu with all links + Get Notified visible.

issues: Framer-motion warning: 'container has a non-static position' — repeated warning; consider adding position:relative on the scroll container. Non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Silence framer-motion 'non-static position' warning by ensuring the scroll parent has position:relative.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean, uses async, excludes _id via projection, proper 409/422 handling, env-driven config, email sends via asyncio.create_task (non-blocking). No issues.
seed_data_creation: Waitlist entries with prefix test_/e2e_ and contact entries with contact_/e2e_c_ prefixes were inserted during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints /api/waitlist, /api/waitlist/count, /api/contact all verified. Waitlist dedup uses email lookup returning 409. For fresh duplicate tests, use a unique email (uuid) since prior test emails exist. Sonner toasts use [data-sonner-toast] selector; invalid-input toasts render briefly, may disappear before scraping — the app logic itself is correct (form does not submit on invalid input).
